name: Pumpkin Mousse (Mf)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the dried apricots with the rum. Bring to a boil, cover and simmer for 1 minute. Let cool in the pot, covered.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the pumpkin, butter, sugar and spices, and chopped nuts.
3. When the apricots are cool enough to handle, cut them into 1/2 inch pieces and stir into the pumpkin mixture. Chill the mixture.
4. Whip the heavy cream until stiff and fold most of it into the mousse, reserving some for decoration if desired.
5. Chill until serving time. Transfer the mixture to wine goblets. If serving company, spoon remaining whipped cream into a pastry bag and pipe rosettes over the center of each mousse in a glass.
Yield: 8 servings
